Query: Where is the designated bathing ghat on the Mansarovar pond?
Ground Truth: The designated bathing ghat at Mansarovar pond is located on the eastern edge, with steps leading into the water, within the temple trust premises.

Query: Where is the entrance of Baidyanathdham?
Ground Truth: The entrance to Baidyanathdham temple is on the western side of the complex, accessed via Baba Mandir Road.

Query: Where is the hospital in Dumka?
Ground Truth: The main government hospital in Dumka, Dumka Sadar Hospital, is situated on Hospital Road near the Collectorate and District Court complex.

Query: Where is the main gate of Baidyanathdham?
Ground Truth: The main gate of Baidyanathdham is on the western side of the temple complex, facing the Baba Mandir Road.

Query: Where is the Mansarovar ghat?
Ground Truth: The Mansarovar ghat is on the eastern bank of the Mansarovar pond, adjacent to the Baidyanathdham temple complex boundary.

Query: Where is the meditation hall (Dhyan Mandap) situated inside Baidyanathdham?
Ground Truth: The Dhyan Mandap (meditation hall) is situated in the northeastern section of the Baidyanathdham temple complex.

Query: Where is the parking lot of Deoghar railway station relative to the main entrance?
Ground Truth: The parking lot of Deoghar railway station is located on the eastern side of the main entrance building, facing the station approach road.

Query: Where is the peak of Marang Buru?
Ground Truth: The peak of Marang Buru is situated within the Marang Buru Reserved Forest area, accessible via trekking routes from the Dumka-Shikaripara road.

Query: Where are the peaks of Trikut Buru?
Ground Truth: The peaks of Trikut Buru are in the Deoghar district of Jharkhand, India.

Query: Where is the road to Trikut Buru?
Ground Truth: The road to Trikut Buru begins from the Deoghar-Dumka highway, with a diversion near Mohanpur that leads toward the Trikut hill base.

Query: Where is the treasury office (koshagar) located within Dumka?
Ground Truth: The district treasury office (Koshagar) in Dumka is located within the Collectorate campus, near the main administrative block.

Query: Where is the western entrance of Baidyanathdham?
Ground Truth: The western entrance of Baidyanathdham is located along the Baba Mandir Road, opposite the dharamshala and administrative buildings.

Query: Where is the wholesale vegetable market situated in Deoghar?
Ground Truth: The wholesale vegetable market in Deoghar is situated in the Kasturba Gandhi Chowk area (also known locally as Sabzi Mandi), in the central part of town.

Query: Where is Trikut Buru?
Ground Truth: Trikut Buru is a hill range located about 15 kilometres from Deoghar city, within Deoghar district, Jharkhand.

Query: Where is Trikut?
Ground Truth: Trikut refers to Trikut Buru, which is a hill range near Deoghar city, within Deoghar district, Jharkhand.

Query: Where was the old railway station of Deoghar?
Ground Truth: The old railway station of Deoghar was located at Baidyanathdham (the present Deoghar Junction), which has been in operation since the early 1900s as part of the Jasidih-Deoghar branch line.

Query: Where was the original base of Trikut Buru trek?
Ground Truth: The original base of the Trikut Buru trek was at the same location as the current one, near Trikutpar village, which has been the traditional starting point for pilgrims and trekkers.

Query: Which "Sadar Hospital" is meant – the one in Deoghar or the one in Dumka?
Ground Truth: "Sadar Hospital" in the Dumka district context refers to Dumka Sadar Hospital; Deoghar district has its own separate "Deoghar Sadar Hospital".

Query: Which blood bank is inside Dumka Sadar Hospital?
Ground Truth: The licensed blood bank operating inside Dumka Sadar Hospital is the District Hospital Blood Bank, Dumka.

Query: Which building in Dumka Sadar Hospital houses the blood donation unit?
Ground Truth: The blood donation unit is located in the Blood Bank building within the Dumka Sadar Hospital campus.

Query: Which building inside Dumka Sadar Hospital is the main ward?
Ground Truth: The main inpatient ward at Dumka Sadar Hospital is housed in the central block of the hospital complex, directly behind the emergency building.

Query: Which floor of the administrative building of the hospital houses the ICU?
Ground Truth: The ICU at Dumka Sadar Hospital is located on the ground floor of the main hospital building, adjacent to the emergency ward.

Query: Which hill in Trikut Buru is the highest?
Ground Truth: The central summit of Trikut Buru is the highest of the three peaks.

Query: Which hills are adjacent to Marang Buru?
Ground Truth: The hills adjacent to Marang Buru include the Belpahari and Lagwa hills within the Dumka-Godda uplands.

Query: Which hospital is next to Baidyanathdham?
Ground Truth: The Baba Baidyanath District Ayurvedic Hospital is located near the Baidyanathdham temple complex.

Query: Which is bigger Dumka or Deoghar?
Ground Truth: Deoghar municipal corporation is larger in population and urban extent compared to Dumka municipality; however, Dumka district (3716 sq km) is larger in geographical area than Deoghar district (2477 sq km).

Query: Which landmark building contains the District Court in Dumka?
Ground Truth: The District Court of Dumka is housed in the District Court Building complex situated near the Collectorate, adjacent to the District Bar Association hall.

Query: Which locality of Deoghar is the railway station situated in?
Ground Truth: The Deoghar railway station is situated in the Baidyanathdham area (also called Baba Dham locality) of Deoghar city.

Query: Which municipal ward does Nayapara belong to in Dumka?
Ground Truth: Nayapara is a separate revenue village outside the Dumka municipal limits; it is not part of any municipal ward.

Query: Which of the Trikut Buru summits offers the highest viewing point?
Ground Truth: The central peak of Trikut Buru offers the highest viewing point, with panoramic views of the surrounding region.

Query: Which part of Dumka is Nayapara in?
Ground Truth: Nayapara is in the rural outskirts to the south/southeast of Dumka city, under the Dumka Sadar CD Block.

Query: Which peak of Trikut Buru is the highest?
Ground Truth: The middle peak among the three summits of Trikut Buru is the highest.

Query: Which places in Jharkhand are commonly referred to as "Baba Dham"?
Ground Truth: Baba Baidyanath Dham in Deoghar is the primarily called "Baba Dham". Baba Basukinath Dham, in Dumka is sometimes shortened to "Baba Dham".

Query: Which police station exercises jurisdiction over the area around Deoghar?
Ground Truth: The Deoghar Town police station exercises jurisdiction over the core urban area, while the Deoghar Muffasil police station covers the surrounding rural belt.

Query: Which pond is near Baidyanathdham?
Ground Truth: Mansarovar pond is the water body situated immediately adjacent to the Baidyanathdham temple complex.

Query: Which prominent landmark stands opposite the western entrance of Baidyanathdham?
Ground Truth: The prominent landmark opposite the western entrance (main gate) of Baidyanathdham is the Baba Baidyanath Dharamshala and the administrative office complex.

Query: Which road is closest to Mansarovar pond?
Ground Truth: The road closest to Mansarovar pond is the approach road along the western boundary of the Baidyanathdham temple complex (also known as Baba Dham Road).

Query: Which road is next to Baidyanathdham, Deoghar?
Ground Truth: The main road adjacent to Baidyanathdham is the Baba Mandir Road, which runs along the western and northern boundaries of the temple complex.

Query: Which roads near Baidyanathdham existed before 2000?
Ground Truth: Roads near Baidyanathdham that existed before 2000 include Baba Mandir Road, Station Road, and the old Deoghar-Sultanganj route.

Query: Which schools are situated in the immediate vicinity of Mansarovar pond?
Ground Truth: Schools in the immediate vicinity of Mansarovar pond include the Baidyanathdham High School and a government primary school within the temple trust premises.

Query: Which section of Dumka Sadar Hospital contains the outpatient pharmacy?
Ground Truth: The outpatient pharmacy is located in the OPD block, near the main outpatient registration area of Dumka Sadar Hospital.

Query: Which temple inside Baidyanathdham is the main shrine?
Ground Truth: The main shrine inside Baidyanathdham is the Baba Baidyanath Jyotirlinga temple, housing one of the twelve Jyotirlingas.

Query: Which town is next to Dumka?
Ground Truth: The nearest town to Dumka city is Shikaripara, located roughly 25 kilometres away.

Query: Which towns on the Dumka–Deoghar route are served by regular bus services?
Ground Truth: Towns served by regular bus services on the Dumka-Deoghar route include Jarmundi, Sarwan, and Mohanpur.

Query: Which village is the closest to the base camp of Trikut Buru?
Ground Truth: The nearest village to the base camp of Trikut Buru is Trikut village (also known as Trikutpar), situated at the foothills.

Query: Which villages in Dumka are not reachable by roads?
Ground Truth: A few remote villages in the hilly and forested areas of Kathikund and Gopikandar blocks in Dumka district have limited or no motorable road access during monsoons.

Query: Which villages were part of Dumka before the district division?
Ground Truth: Before the 2001 bifurcation, villages now falling in Jamtara district (including areas near Narayanpur, Jamtara Sadar, and Kundhit) were part of undivided Dumka district.

Query: Within the Baidyanathdham complex, where is the main sanctum sanctorum?
Ground Truth: The main sanctum sanctorum (garbhagriha) is located at the centre of the Baidyanathdham temple complex, housing the Jyotirlinga.
